title: royena lycioides subsp. sericea
intro: Royena lycioides subsp. sericea, also known as the sericeous royena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Australia, and its leaves and bark have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Royena lycioides subsp. sericea can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
